detaileddescription.para: weights of observation distributions deduced from the restoration

briefdescription.para: Destruction of the data members of a CategoricalProcess object.

parameterdescription.para: flag on the construction of the observation distributions.

briefdescription.para: Assignment operator of the CategoricalProcess class.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::ostream &os, FrequencyDistribution **empirical_observation, FrequencyDistribution *marginal_distribution, bool exhaustive, bool file_flag, model_type model=HIDDEN_MARKOV) const
memberdef.name: ascii_print

parameterdescription.para: pointer on the observation frequency distributions,
pointer on the marginal frequency distribution,

briefdescription.para: Writing of a CategoricalProcess object at the spreadsheet format.

parameterdescription.para: pointer on the observation frequency distributions,
pointer on the marginal frequency distribution,

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *prefix, const char *title, int process, FrequencyDistribution **empirical_observation=NULL, FrequencyDistribution *marginal_distribution=NULL, model_type model=HIDDEN_MARKOV) const

parameterdescription.para: pointer on the observation frequency distributions,
pointer on the marginal frequency distribution,

parameterdescription.para: pointer on the observation frequency distributions,
pointer on the marginal frequency distribution,

briefdescription.para: test of the overlap between the categories observed in each state.
Application of a threshold on the observation probabilities.
Permutation of observation distributions. The permutation validity should be checked by the calling function.
Computation of the number of free parameters of a categorical observation process.
Computation of a mixture of categorical observation distributions.

memberdef.argsstring: (StatError &error, ifstream &in_file, int &line, int nb_state, model_type model, bool hidden)
memberdef.name: parsing

briefdescription.para: Analysis of the format of categorical observation distributions.

parameterdescription.para: reference on the file line index,
flag on the overlap of observation distributions.

briefdescription.para: Analysis of the format of observation distributions for a collection of categorical observation processes.

parameterdescription.para: reference on the file line index,

detaileddescription.para: Collection of univariate categorical emission distributions. In the multivariate case, use a collection of conditionally independent CategoricalProcesses observations[k] is a pointer to emission distribution for state k
